doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains dangerous legal misinformation (tenants are not legally required to vacate without a court proceeding), references a non-existent joint HUD/Illinois AG publication with a future effective date, and appears designed to
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains critically false legal information (a 5-day pay-or-quit notice in Illinois does NOT legally require a tenant to vacate without a court proceeding — eviction still requires a judicial process), uses a future "effective" date, and no such HUD/Illinois AG joint "TRF-2026-IL" fact sheet exists; the document appears designed to deceive tenants into surrendering housing rights they actually possess.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document contains dangerous legal misinformation (tenants are not legally required to vacate without a court proceeding), references a non-existent joint HUD/Illinois AG publication with a future effective date, and appears designed to strip tenants of their actual legal rights.
